input:
Title: Security: Rotate all API keys after potential exposure
Author: Security Bot
Assignee: CISO Lin Wei
Labels: security, critical
Priority: P0

Body:
During a routine audit on 2026-03-15, analyst Hana Park discovered that the staging .env file was briefly exposed in a public GitHub Actions log. Affected keys: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.

Required actions:
1. Rotate ANTHROPIC_API_KEY immediately - owner: DevOps team
2. Rotate STRIPE_SECRET_KEY immediately - owner: Payments team (lead: Oscar B.)
3. Add secret scanning CI check - owner: Lin Wei, deadline 2026-04-01
4. Post-mortem: April 5, 2026
